leadText: The Griseous Orb (Japanese: はっきんだま Platinum Orb) is a type of held item introduced in Pokémon Platinum. It boosts the power of Dragon- and Ghost-type moves when held by Giratina, and prior to Pokémon Legends: Arceus, it would change Giratina into its Origin Forme while held. It is one of the orbs associated with the Pokémon of myth.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.2 Generations IV to VIII 1.3 Generation IX 1.4 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generations IV to VIII [ edit | edit source ] If held by Giratina , it increases the power of its Dragon - and Ghost-type moves by 20%. Unaffected by item negating effects (such as Embargo and Klutz ). Item manipulating effects (such as Trick and Fling ) cannot give Giratina a Griseous Orb or remove a Griseous Orb from Giratina. Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] The Griseous Orb is now affected by item manipulating and negating effects due to no longer causing Giratina to change form. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] From Generation IV to VIII, the Griseous Orb allows Giratina to remain in its Origin Forme outside of the Distortion World . In Pokémon Scarlet and Violet , the Griseous Core must be held to transform Giratina into its Origin Forme instead. In Pokémon Platinum and HeartGold and SoulSilver , only Giratina can hold a Griseous Orb, and Pokémon holding a Griseous Orb cannot be traded . From Generation V onward, these restrictions no longer apply.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods Pt Distortion World (from Turnback Cave ) HG SS Sinjoh Ruins (held by Giratina ) B W Marvelous Bridge (given by the Shadow Triad ) B2 W2 Dragonspiral Tower X Y Terminus Cave OR AS Route 130 ( underwater ) S M US UM Hau'oli City Mall (Antiquities of the Ages) Sw Sh Stow-on-Side (from the bargain shop keeper after completing the main story, if the player owns a Giratina ) BD SP Ramanas Park (after defeating Origin Forme Giratina) S V Porto Marinada auction (if the player owns a Giratina ) Distribution [ edit | edit source ] As a held item [ edit | edit source ] Games Event Language/Region Distribution period X Y OR AS Dahara City Giratina Japan June 20 to August 31, 2015 June 27 to 28, 2015 Dahara City Giratina Korean November 26, 2015 to January 31, 2016

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Pt HG SS A glowing orb to be held by Giratina . It boosts the power of Dragon- and Ghost-type moves. B W B2 W2 A glowing orb to be held by Giratina. It boosts the power of Dragon- and Ghost-type moves. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A glowing orb to be held by Giratina. It boosts the power of Dragon- and Ghost-type moves when it is held. S V A shining gem to be held by Giratina. It boosts the power of Giratina's Dragon- and Ghost-type moves.
